message:
style: rustfmt formatting pass across 8 connectors and test suites

Apply consistent rustfmt formatting across browser, figma, jira,
twilio, notion, zendesk connectors plus github, openai, and
fcp-conformance test files.

All changes are purely cosmetic — function signatures collapsed or
expanded to match rustfmt line-width rules, method chains reformatted,
match arms and test assertions reflowed, struct constructor formatting
normalized. Zero logic changes across all 23 files.

Connectors touched: browser (client, connector, main), figma (client,
connector, error, tests), jira (client, connector, tests), twilio
(client, connector, main, tests), notion (client, connector, error),
zendesk (client, connector, main), github (tests), openai (tests),
fcp-conformance (e2e tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
